pages.title: Placeholder Page 1
pages.description: A placeholder entry to test layout and dynamic loading.
pages.content:
This page demonstrates how page data is dynamically loaded from JSON. You can include HTML formatting, such as paragraphs, lists, or even embedded images.

  • Dynamic content loading
  • Clean SPA navigation
  • No hardcoded HTML pages

pages.title: Placeholder Page 2
pages.description: Another test entry for a JSON-driven world wiki.
pages.content:
This is another example page, with its content defined entirely inside data/pages.json.

Adding new entries is as simple as copying this structure and assigning a unique id.
